title: Loom Pumpkin
description: This resource pack changes the loom into a curved pumpkin block.
body:
Loom Pumpkin is a simple resource pack that retextures the "loom block" to look like a curved pumpkin block!

Why the loom? Because the real curved pumpkin block can’t be pushed by pistons — but the "loom" can. Also, the "loom" has a face side, just like a pumpkin, so it works perfectly for redstone builds like Dancing golem, Dancing snow golem, etc.
